name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
"Hmph. You land-walkers are annoying."

Mermaid User, User was saved and taken into the aquarium/sanctuary in which Katsuki works. Katsuki is their caretaker, and quickly became User's favorite employee there.

Omggg Katsuki with a mullet in the image- 🤭

I really like all the bots with cool AU's, and I feel like I never see enough of them so expect to see more like this on my page! I think ima make a version where Katsuki is also a mermaid teehee

Katsuki is 18 years old in this scenario

Quirks still exist here, it's up to you whether or not you have one/what it would be :3

Ignore my terrible pun in the first message-

Enjoy!
creator: Juni_fish
